heroBanner.title: Studying at Al-Sharq College of Specialized Technical Sciences
heroBanner.body:
Your educational journey at Al-Sharq College begins through specialized technical academic programs, designed to equip students with the scientific knowledge and practical skills needed to meet the demands of the local and regional job market.

By adopting modern curricula that combine theoretical and applied aspects, the college provides a solid scientific foundation across its various disciplines, focusing on developing analytical thinking, scientific reasoning, and professional skills — preparing students for a successful academic and professional career in their specialized fields.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.welcome: Hello! I'm the AI assistant of Al-Sharq College. How can I help you?
responses: You can explore our various academic programs in the Academics section.
For admission requirements and deadlines, please visit the Admission page.
Our campus facilities include libraries, labs, sports centers, and student housing.
You can contact the registration office at 07744445669 during working hours.
We offer bachelor's, master's, PhD, and diploma programs across multiple disciplines.
Our research centers focus on medical engineering, AI, and sustainable development.
Student activities include clubs, sports teams, cultural events, and volunteer programs.
Official working hours: Sunday to Thursday from 8:00 AM to 3:00 PM.
The college is located in Basra - Al-Zaytoun District - Hamdan Road. You can visit us during office hours.
For inquiries, you can email us or call 07870703000.
We provide a fully integrated digital library with thousands of books and scientific articles.
You can apply online through the electronic admission portal on our website.
Scholarships are available for outstanding students and students with limited income.
Student life at Al-Sharq College is full of events and activities throughout the year.
We have partnerships with Arab and international universities for student and faculty exchange.
Registration for the next semester begins in August each year.
We offer academic advising services for new students to help them choose their majors.
College labs are equipped with the latest devices and scientific technologies.
Students can benefit from practical training programs in cooperation with the private sector.
We have a continuing education center offering training courses and professional certificates.

about.title: About the College
about.subtitle: About Al-Sharq College for Specialized Technical Sciences
about.content: Al-Sharq College for Specialized Technical Sciences was established to provide advanced technical education that meets the needs of the local and global market. The college seeks to equip students with the latest knowledge and technical skills enabling them to adapt to the rapid changes in the world of technology, through advanced academic programs aimed at achieving excellence in education and scientific research.

vision.title: Vision
vision.content: Excellence in technical education and leadership in building sustainable applied knowledge

mission.title: Mission
mission.content: Al-Sharq College for Specialized Technical Sciences seeks to provide distinguished technical education that combines theoretical knowledge and practical application, by investing in qualified human cadres and providing a stimulating educational environment that keeps pace with technological developments, to prepare graduates with the scientific and practical skills necessary for the labor market, and to support applied scientific research and innovation, and enhance partnership with society and the public and private sectors to contribute to sustainable development.

goals.title: Strategic Goals
items: Human Resources Development: Attracting distinguished academic and administrative cadres, continuous development of staff skills, and promoting a culture of creativity and innovation.
Educational Process Development: Updating curricula to meet labor market needs, adopting modern interactive teaching methods, and introducing digital technologies in education.

Scientific Research Enhancement: Supporting applied research linked to societal needs, encouraging publication in reputable scientific journals, and building local and international research partnerships.
Quality and Accreditation: Applying comprehensive quality standards in education, seeking academic accreditation for programs, and improving institutional performance and academic reputation.
Sustainability and Resources: Diversifying funding sources, efficiently investing available resources, and developing the college's infrastructure and technology.
Community Service: Enhancing the college's role in community service, supporting volunteer initiatives and community activities, and providing training and consulting programs.

Relations and Cooperation: Expanding cooperation with universities and academic institutions, building partnerships with the private sector, and enhancing openness to international educational experiences.
